briefing: Market direction is flat and neutral today with no reliable data on catalysts, so this isn't the risk-on setup our strategy waits for. Holding all 6 existing positions and keeping the $777 cash in reserve rather than forcing a buy into an unconfirmed session.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A risk-off stance means staying cautious and avoiding new positions when the market gives no clear signal, rather than trading just to stay active. Sitting in cash on an unclear day protects capital for when a genuine opportunity appears.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避」（Risk-Off）指在市場訊號不明朗時保持謹慎，避免建立新倉位，而非為求交易而交易。在方向不明的日子持有現金，可保留資本，靜待真正的入市機會出現。

market_education.summary_en: No market-moving headlines were available today, and both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 showed 0.0% moves, indicating a quiet, directionless session. Without a clear catalyst or volume-backed signal, institutional participation appears limited today. This kind of flat, low-information day is best treated as a pause rather than a trend change.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日未有明顯的市場消息，納指及標普500指數均錄得0.0%的變動，反映市場方向不明、交投淡靜。在缺乏明確催化劑或成交量支持的情況下，機構參與度似乎有限。這類平淡、缺乏資訊的交易日應視為短暫停頓，而非趨勢逆轉。
